title: Bombay High Court refuses to stay release of movie Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai
description: The vacation bench of Bombay High Court on Thursday declined to stay the worldwide release of Hindi movie ‘Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai' over copyright controversy in relation to two songs in the movie. Justice Farhan P Dubash refused to grant any urgent relief to Puja Films (now Puja Entertainment India Ltd) which moved the Court seeking to stall the release of the movie over use of the songs ‘Chunnari Chunnari’ and ‘Ishq Sona Hai.’ “This Court is not inclined to entertain the urgent appli
